payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial view of a dark-stained wooden base kitchen cabinet with recessed-panel doors and visible vertical paneling; a cloth towel is draped over a drawer/handle, the countertop and sink edge are visible above, and the cabinet is cropped at the right edge — approximately 0.7 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark wooden base cabinet, edge-crop","long_description":"Partial view of a dark-stained wooden base kitchen cabinet with recessed-panel doors and visible vertical paneling; a cloth towel is draped over a drawer/handle, the countertop and sink edge are visible above, and the cabinet is cropped at the right edge — approximately 0.7 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark stained wood","recessed-panel doors","towel draped on handle","edge-cropped / partial","countertop and sink edge visible","vertical paneling"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.7}
